must_detect.matched_text:
Internal Compliance Note — Vriddhi Chemtech Limited (Legal & Secretarial) to Board and Functional Leads
This memo summarizes DPDPA compliance for identifiers and our insider trading controls under the Indian securities regulator’s PIT Regulations, 2015.
For routine vendor onboarding, do not request Aadhaar; if a form has “Aadhaar No: ______”, treat as optional and redact; example placeholder “0000 0000 0000” must never be stored as real data.
Likewise avoid capturing PAN in general files; label-only fields “PAN: ______” and “GSTIN: ______” on templates are permitted; sample GSTIN “29AAAAA0000A1Z0” is invalid and for illustration.
Our corporate CIN on letterheads may appear as “U00000MH2024PLC000000 (sample)”; this is non-personal and may be used in public-facing documents.
For child interactions (under 18) in campus outreach, obtain guardian consent; do not collect school IDs or Aadhaar for age verification; use parental declaration instead.
Any investor update must exclude unpublished price sensitive information (UPSI); only facts already posted to a national stock exchange through our 14 May 2025 notice may be shared by Investor Relations.
For board packs, replace any bank account field “Account No: __________” and residential address fields “Address Line 1/2: __________” with masked values unless a legal requirement exists.
Intentional exception: for a single contractor travel booking, a passport identifier will be retained per law—Passport No: T8394021—stored in the restricted HR vault with 90-day deletion.
